items.title: Add this magnetic 42-in-1 screwdriver set with T-handle and ratcheting design to your toolkit for $15 (Reg. $25)
items.summary:
ORIA 42-in-1 T-Handle Magnetic Screwdriver Set

Buy for $15 (Reg. $25)

What we love

Sometimes using a powered screwdriver can rapidly strip or overtighten screws, and that’s when using a hand tool makes a lot more sense. Not only does this kit give you a nice. grip with the T-style handle, but it also has a ratcheting design that makes it easy to just keep tightening over and over without resetting your grip after each turn.

Truth be told, I have several of mounts like this around the house. They’re often marketed as useful for flights, and they are, but I think they can really be used plenty of other places too thanks to the built-in clamp. This unit even has a light too, which is a unique perk for sure, but a perk nonetheless.
